name: BBQ Ribs, 1991 Mim Championship Winner
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all rub ingredients thoroughly.
2. Combine sauce ingredients in a large saucepan. Bring to a rolling boil, reduce heat and simmer 1 1/2 hours, stirring every 10 minutes or so. Pour into sterilized canning jars, seal and let stand 2-6 weeks before use.
3. Sprinkle dry rub liberally over ribs, allowing to stand at room temperature until the ribs appear wet.
4. Prepare a smoker for long, slow cooking at less than 230 degrees.
5. Cook ribs, bone down for 2 hours at less than 230 in an indirect heated cooker.
6. Turn and cook for another 2 hours.
7. Turn and cook one more hour.
8. During the last 15 minutes, baste with sauce diluted half with water.
